Arachne rouse(white border card that grants passive ability) gives u the ability to take specific card out

Arachne allows you to fill your ultra space twice during the turn you take a card out
Instead of delaying your ultra turn
Also arachne's ultra isnt normal ultra
So if u play a non ultra arachne team youre playing the normal version instead
